summary: PDF Generation Feature Testing Complete - All backend (18/18) and frontend tests passed. Form-1, Form-3, Form-4, and Annexure-A PDF generation working correctly. Data persistence verified for Projects, Buildings, and Construction Progress.

minor.issue: Invalid report type returns 500 instead of 400 (low priority edge case)

issues: Missing DialogDescription - accessibility warning in console (not visible to users)

passed_tests: Backend: Auth login returns valid token
Backend: GET /api/generate-pdf/{project_id}/form-1 - Returns valid PDF (6641 bytes)
Backend: GET /api/generate-pdf/{project_id}/form-3 - Returns valid PDF (5684 bytes)
Backend: GET /api/generate-pdf/{project_id}/form-4 - Returns valid PDF (3992 bytes)
Backend: GET /api/generate-pdf/{project_id}/annexure-a - Returns valid PDF (2540 bytes)
Backend: Invalid report type returns error (500)
Backend: Non-existent project returns 404
Backend: Missing quarter parameter returns 422
Backend: Missing year parameter returns 422
Backend: PDF response has correct Content-Disposition header with filename
Backend: PDF generation works for all quarters (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4)
Backend: Project fetch by ID returns correct data
Backend: Buildings fetch by project_id returns building list
Backend: Construction progress fetch returns progress records
Backend: Form-1 HTML preview generation works
Backend: Form-3 HTML preview generation works
Backend: Form-4 HTML preview generation works
Backend: Annexure-A HTML preview generation works
Frontend: Reports page loads with all 7 report types
Frontend: PDF Ready badges displayed for form-1, form-3, form-4, annexure-a
Frontend: Preview and Download PDF buttons visible and clickable
Frontend: Form-1 Preview dialog opens with proper RERA header
Frontend: Form-1 PDF download triggers with correct filename
Frontend: Form-3 PDF download triggers with correct filename
Frontend: Form-4 PDF download triggers with correct filename
Frontend: Annexure-A PDF download triggers with correct filename
Frontend: Success toast shown after PDF download
Frontend: Projects persist across page reload (1 project)
Frontend: Buildings persist across page reload (31 buildings)
Frontend: Construction Progress page loads with detailed activity tracking
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Invalid report type should return 400 instead of 500 for better error handling

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components working, all 4 PDF downloads verified)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing project 6024c5c1-3df8-45f6-a77b-07499f1cbccf (Expat Vida Phase2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation feature fully tested. All 4 PDF-enabled reports (form-1, form-3, form-4, annexure-a) generate valid PDFs using reportlab library. Preview functionality works for all report types. Data persistence verified - Projects, Buildings, and Construction Progress all persist across page reloads.

form1_pdf.details: Architect Certificate PDF - generates valid 6641-byte PDF with construction progress tables

form3_pdf.details: Engineer Certificate PDF - generates valid 5684-byte PDF with building costs

form4_pdf.details: CA Certificate PDF - generates valid 3992-byte PDF with project cost breakdown

annexure_a_pdf.details: Sales Statement PDF - generates valid 2540-byte PDF in landscape format

reports_page_ui.details: Reports page displays all 7 report types with correct badges, Preview and Download PDF buttons work

data_persistence.details: Projects (1), Buildings (31), Construction Progress all persist across page reloads
